title: Heidi and Peter
writer: Johanna Spyri, Richard Schweizer, Max Haufler
actors: Heinrich Gretler, Elsbeth Sigmund, Thomas Klameth
plot: Heidi lives with her grandfather in the Swiss Alps in the summer, and she and Peter play and tend the goats. In the winter, she stays with Peter's mother, and she and Peter attend school. One day a letter arrives from Heidi's frie...
